violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a build up of food and debris under shelving units in walk in coolers, walk in freezers, & dry storage area.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Degreaser bottle and grill cleaner bottle stored on counter. Store away from work surfaces with other cleaning chemicals.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers need detail cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under shelving units and equipment in walk in units and kitchen.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Fly trap located above stationary kitchen mixer.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
